title: Ol' Reliable Fishing
description: This datapack restores the fishing system so now you will be able to fish for treasures in 1x1 water blocks again.
body:
This datapack restores the fishing system so now you will be able to fish for treasures in 1x1 water blocks again.
Standard Version Jellyfish Version
This versions restores the legacy system of Fishing, being able to fish in 1x1 block waterbodies. Aside from restoring legacy Fishing system, this version includes two additional drop tables to make Fishing even more exciting!
Download Standard Download Jellyfish

Details

The Jellyfish Version adds two more loot tables into the game, combat and mineral, their purposes not so hard to assume... here are the probabilities!
Loot Table Base Luck of the Sea
I II III
Fish 80.95% 80.00% 79.05% 76.64%
Junk 9.52% 5.71% 1.90% 0.00%
Treasure 4.76% 6.67% 8.57% 10.28%
Mineral 3.81% 5.71% 7.62% 9.35%
Combat 0.95% 1.90% 2.86% 3.74%

  • Minecraft 1.21 or newer!

  1. Download Ol'-Reliable-Fishing.zip.
  2. Put it inside the datapacks folder of your Minecraft World.
  3. Restart/Run the server for the datapack to load.
  4. Done! Now you should be able legacy fish again!
